channel.title: Alefiya Hussain
channel.description: Networked cybersecurity experimentation, testbeds & reproducible research

item.title: Welcome
item.dc:creator: Alefiya Hussain
item.description:
Welcome to my blog. This is where I’ll write about the things my research touches day to day: building and operating cybersecurity testbeds, measuring denial-of-service and defenses in ways that actually reproduce, generating realistic network traffic, and the practical side of making experiments trustworthy.

Expect posts that pair a research paper with the why it matters and, where useful, pointers to code and data. If you’re new here, start with my research or browse the publications.

More soon.
